name: Clara.CLI

array_types.name: Argument_Array
array_types.code: type Argument_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Value_String;

array_types.name: Command_Active
array_types.code: type Command_Active     is array (Command_Id)    of Boolean;

array_types.name: Command_Defs
array_types.code: type Command_Defs    is array (Command_Id)    of Command_Def;

array_types.name: Flag_Defs
array_types.code: type Flag_Defs       is array (Flag_Id)       of Flag_Def;

array_types.name: Flag_Results
array_types.code: type Flag_Results       is array (Flag_Id)       of Flag_Result;

array_types.name: Option_Defs
array_types.code: type Option_Defs     is array (Option_Id)     of Option_Def;

array_types.name: Option_Results
array_types.code: type Option_Results     is array (Option_Id)     of Option_Result;

array_types.name: Positional_Defs
array_types.code: type Positional_Defs is array (Positional_Id) of Positional_Def;

array_types.name: Positional_Results
array_types.code: type Positional_Results is array (Positional_Id) of Positional_Result;

Command_Def
Flag_Def

Parse_Results

Positional_Result

generic_instantiations.name: Parse_Outcome

documentation.description:
App_Name / App_Description are kept as generic formals so consumers
can document branding inside their own help renderers.  Clara itself
does not consume them (Show_Help was removed in favor of pure
outcome-driven help / version handling).
